extraction.one_line_summary: GIRMAY Biniam won Stage 3 via pre-finish sprint lap reconnaissance, holding leader's jersey after making final climb hard with 30-40 riders remaining.
tactical_patterns: GIRMAY pre-rode finish circuit one lap before, identifying sprint characteristics that suited him specifically over pure sprinters.
Intermarché executed full team effort to control final climb despite 30-40 rider group, protecting jersey rather than isolating.
GIRMAY recognizes next stage as winnable but mountains beyond as threshold, suggesting weight/climbing ratio limits jersey defense strategy.

rider_signals.GIRMAY Biniam: positive: consecutive dominant performances suggest early-season form peak, tactical maturity in course reconnaissance beyond pure sprinting ability
